div1.entryFree: Prostrate, adj. lying at one's length: mother Jourdain, be you p. and grovel on the earth, H6B I, 4, 13. == in a posture of extreme humility: this p. and exterior bending, H4B IV, 5, 149. look gracious on thy p. thrall, H6A I, 2, 117. being p. Caes. III, 1, 125. I will fall p. at his feet, Err. V, 114. Rom. IV, 2, 20.
